backgrounds.name: Acolyte
backgrounds.description: You have spent your life in the service of a temple to a specific god or gods.

backgrounds.name: Charlatan
backgrounds.description: You have always had a way with people. You know what makes them tick, you're a master of manipulation.

backgrounds.name: Criminal
backgrounds.description: You are an experienced criminal with a history of breaking the law.

backgrounds.name: Entertainer
backgrounds.description: You thrive in front of an audience. You know how to captivate them, entertain them, and even inspire them.

backgrounds.name: Folk Hero
backgrounds.description: You come from a humble social rank, but you are destined for something more.

backgrounds.name: Guild Artisan
backgrounds.description: You are a skilled member of a guild, which serves as an extended family.

backgrounds.name: Hermit
backgrounds.description: You lived in seclusion—either in a sheltered community such as a monastery, or entirely alone.

backgrounds.name: Noble
backgrounds.description: You understand wealth, power, and privilege. You carry a noble title and your family owns land.

backgrounds.name: Outlander
backgrounds.description: You grew up in the wilds, far from civilization and the comforts of town and technology.

backgrounds.name: Sage
backgrounds.description: You spent years learning the lore of the multiverse. You scoured manuscripts, studied scrolls, and listened to the greatest experts.

backgrounds.name: Sailor
backgrounds.description: You sailed on a seagoing vessel for years. In that time, you faced worse storms than any squall.

backgrounds.name: Soldier
backgrounds.description: War has been your life for as long as you care to remember. You trained as a youth, fought in several campaigns, and have the scars to prove it.

backgrounds.name: Urchin
backgrounds.description: You grew up on the streets alone, orphaned, and poor. You had no one to watch out for you, so you had to watch out for yourself.
